{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Indirial, son of Aleias
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] is the son of Aleias.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
